programme.title: Enzo Ferrari
programme.desc: L'Uomo, la Rossa, il Mito. Giorgio Porra' racconta Enzo Ferrari: trionfi in pista, dolori privati e la storia di un visionario che ha reso Ferrari sinonimo di velocita' ed eccellenza

programme.title: Dakar 2026: I Signori Della Sabbia
programme.desc: Il resoconto della Dakar 2026 disputata per la settima volta nel deserto dell'Arabia Saudita. Curato da Sandro Donato Grosso.

programme.title: This Is Padel - Ep. 7 - This Is Padel 2026 Ep.7 05/06/2026
programme.desc: I protagonisti, le sfide e gli eventi nazionali e internazionali in collegamento con i circoli di tutta Italia. Gli eventi del padel dilettantistico e le analisi dei materiali tecnici all'avanguardia.

programme.title: Ep.19
programme.desc: Regate, grandi eventi, saloni nautici e tutto il nuovo che arriva dal mondo della cantieristica, a vela e a motore. In ogni occasione, un personaggio del mondo della nautica si racconta al pubblico.

programme.title: Halifax: Giorno 1
programme.desc: Le gare del SailGP.

programme.title: 24 ore di Le Mans
programme.desc: Guardiamo i momenti migliori alla 24 Ore di Le Mans 2026, mentre le auto e i piloti piu' veloci si contendono la pole position sul Circuit de la Sarthe.

programme.title: Genk: Belgio
programme.desc: ... Championship. - La sintesi, i momenti salienti e l'analisi in pista del Campionato Europeo a Genk, Belgio.

programme.title: Ep.37
programme.desc: Avventure, sfide, storie, imprese e tante curiosita' dal mondo degli sport all'aperto: dopo 15 anni alla ricerca del limite, Icarus si spinge oltre per trasformarsi in Icarus Ultra.

programme.title: Semifinale 2: Montpellier Hérault Rugby - Stade Français Paris

programme.desc: La magia col Celtic, la storica doppietta di Old Trafford fino all'ultima perla contro l'Atletico: riviviamo tutti i gol di Kaka' in Champions League con le maglie di Milan e Real Madrid.

programme.title: Parma - Marsiglia 1999
programme.desc: ... Europa League Story. - Il Parma e' l'ultima squadra italiana ad aver conquistato la Coppa Uefa/Europa League. La squadra di Malesani poteva contare su Buffon, Thuram, Cannavaro, Veron e Crespo. TC: Marianella.

programme.title: Didier Drogba
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Le partite memorabili, i gol, le giocate incredibili di Didier Drogba in Champions League raccontate con la colonna sonora di History Remix.

programme.title: Arsenal - Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: ... League. - Entrambe reduci dalle sconfitte contro Liverpool e West Ham. Il Nottingham non vince sul campo dell'Arsenal dal 1989, da allora 4 pareggi e 10 sconfitte. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Marchegiani
programme.desc: Reload

programme.title: La Giovane Italia 2026 Ep.17 18/06/2026

programme.title: Tutti i gol di Del Piero in Champions
programme.desc: Una compilation di gol indimenticabili: riviviamo insieme le 42 reti che la bandiera della Juventus Alessandro Del Piero ha segnato in Champions League nel corso della sua carriera.

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale
programme.desc: Curiosita', commenti, notizie e anticipazioni sui possibili movimenti del calciomercato. Condotto dal trio Alessandro Bonan, Gianluca Di Marzio e Fayna.

programme.title: Lo sbarco del fenomeno: Ronnie e l'Inter
George Best
programme.desc: ... Storie di campioni. - Un appassionante viaggio nella storia del campione nordirlandese, nella citta' dove tutto ha avuto inizio: Belfast. Perche' "Maradona good, Pele' better, George... Best!".

programme.title: Borussia Dortmund - Real Madrid
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Tedeschi alla terza finale di UCL: una vinta nel 1997 e una persa nel 2013. Real alla sesta in 11 stagioni con 5 vittorie. Ha vinto gli ultimi 2 precedenti. TC: Zancan-Marchegiani.

programme.title: FNF: Bournemouth v Man Utd
programme.desc: With daylight between them and Villa, Manchester United's fight for Champions League qualification continues on Friday Night Football with a trip to Bournemouth's Vitality Stadium. (20.03)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Four games without a win and nine points away from safety, relegation-threatened Burnley need a result here as Fulham - who also drew 0-0 last week - visit Turf Moor. (21.03)

programme.title: SNF: Everton v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: After a midweek European exit, Chelsea's attention turns to qualification again as the Blues head to the Hill Dickinson Stadium for a clash with fellow European-hopefuls Everton. (21.03)

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football at Elland Road, Leeds United - three points above the Premier League's drop zone - play host to a Keith Andrews Brentford side dreaming of Europe. (21.03)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: A St James' Park Tyne-Wear derby on Super Sunday sees local rivals Newcastle and Sunderland collide in the Premier League. The two teams are separated by just two points. (22.03)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Climbing out of the bottom three for the first time since December last weekend, can West Ham pull clear again as Nuno Espirito Santo's men visit Villa on Super Sunday? (22.03)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: On a huge afternoon at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, a desperate Spurs take on relegation rivals Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Super Sunday. (22.03)

programme.title: FNF: West Ham v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: A point from safety, Nuno Espirito Santo's West Ham welcome bottom-of-the-table Wolves to the London Stadium. Rob Edwards' visitors have won two of their last three. (10.04)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Seventh meets eighth in the race for Europe as Brentford - held to three consecutive Premier League draws - entertain David Moyes' Everton at the Gtech Community Stadium. (11.04)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton, who prior to the international break collected back-to-back wins, resume their bid for European football next season with a trip to Burnley's Turf Moor. (11.04)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Crystal Palace and Newcastle meet at Selhurst Park on Super Sunday. Three Premier League points separates the hosts from the Magpies, with Palace also holding a game in hand. (12.04)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v A. Villa Hlts
programme.desc: With both sides picking up much-needed wins before the break, Nottingham Forest's fight for survival resumes against an Aston Villa side chasing Champions League qualification. (12.04)

programme.title: SNF: Liverpool v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: With one route back into the Champions League virtually closed midweek, can Arne Slot's Liverpool prise open another as they host Fulham in their bid to secure a top-five finish? (11.04)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: The Roberto De Zerbi era begins for Tottenham Hotspur. With games running out, Spurs are desperately chasing a result away to Regis Le Bris' European outsiders Sunderland. (12.04)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: The Carabao Cup winners Manchester City, who booked another trip to Wembley last weekend, go to Chelsea on Super Sunday bidding to keep touch with Premier League leaders Arsenal. (12.04)

programme.title: MNF: Man Utd v Leeds Utd Hlts
programme.desc: One of England's most famous rivalries is renewed on Monday Night Football as Michael Carrick's Champions League-chasing Manchester United host FA Cup semi-finalists Leeds. (13.04)

programme.title: PL Stories: Julian Dicks
programme.desc: Spend the day with Julian Dicks, best known for his time at West Ham, as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
programme.desc: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
programme.desc: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: EFL Cup 11/12: Cardiff v Liverpool
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from yesteryear. Here, Cardiff City and Liverpool meet in the final of the Carling Cup at Wembley Stadium in 2012.

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Goals 2022/23
programme.desc: Enjoy a compilation of some of the best goals scored throughout the 2022-23 Scottish Premiership campaign.

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Goals 2023/24
programme.desc: Enjoy a compilation of some of the best goals scored throughout the 2023-24 Scottish Premiership campaign.

programme.title: EFL Cup Retro 19:ManCity v Chelsea
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic EFL Cup final. Here, the 2018-19 final as Chelsea and Manchester City went head-to-head at Wembley. City were looking to defend their title from 2018.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.title: EFL 97/98: Charlton v Sunderland
programme.desc: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League - here, rewind to May 1998 for the First Division play-off final at Wembley, as Charlton met Sunderland in an eight-goal thriller.

programme.title: EFL 98/99: Gillingham v Man City
programme.desc: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, remember the thrilling 1998-99 Second Division play-off final between Gillingham and Manchester City at Wembley.

programme.title: Championship Season Review 24/25
programme.desc: Revisit the 2024-2025 Sky Bet Championship campaign, a season that saw Leeds United and Burnley secure Premier League returns alongside Sunderland via the play-offs.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2024/25
programme.desc: From the Valley all the way to Wembley - this season's Carabao Cup has thrown up a host of stunning goals. Look back at the finest strikes from the 2024-25 competition.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2024/25
